message:
Fix char boundary panic in governance gate, preserve float precision in join keys, and prevent underflow in conformal guard

- Fix potential panic in find_unnegated_narrowing_phrase by adjusting
  the context window start to a valid UTF-8 char boundary before slicing
- Add FloatBits variant to JoinKeyComponent for non-integer floats so
  that values like 1.5 are not truncated to 1 during join key
  construction, preserving correct join semantics for fractional values
- Replace index subtraction with saturating_sub in ConformalGuard
  quantile calculation to prevent underflow when the tail index is 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
